title: lateristachys lateralis
intro: Lateristachys lateralis, a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Rutaceae, is a species commonly found in China and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and viruses, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Lateristachys lateralis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Lateristachys lateralis can be consumed as teas, capsules, or infusions, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
